Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Othaghor]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Othaghor is a figure whose worship the Greenwardens were originally meant to counteract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Othaghor is said to share bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Calder conquered the unnamed monsters of Othaghor and his brood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Othaghor was reached by the Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Othaghor wants to preserve life above all else.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Othaghor contains a desert temple.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Othaghor is capable of taking bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Othaghor is a possible deity or symbol worshipped by the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — A voice like Othaghor bellowed behind Meia.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — The Bellowing Horror is a spawn of Othaghor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Othaghor is dividing people up piece by piece to be devoured.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Othaghor is a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Othaghor is a figure associated with the era of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Othaghor is a frog-faced Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Othaghor has bizarre amphibian creatures.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Othaghor is the size of a large dog and flattened like a centipede with webbed amphibian legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Othaghor has bright green skin and three yellow eyes on either side of its head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Othaghor has a long red-tipped stinger at the end of its body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Othaghor's jaws look like a cross between fish teeth and spider mandibles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Othaghor has spawn that inhabit the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Othaghor's hordes are known for their variety of poisons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Othaghor is a being capable of making any living creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Othaghor is a creator of Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The hordes of Othaghor possess claws that can rend iron and pierce minds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Othaghor is an unknown entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Othaghor is endless biology involving breeding, consumption, and mutation.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Othaghor is a Hordefather.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Othaghor is something the Regents might let out for a fistfight.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
